rows.question: What is document/file 'Student Validation Report' used for?
rows.answer: Report of valid rows, invalid rows, duplicate warnings, missing fields, consent errors.
rows.build_instruction: Represent document student_validation_report in files/documents spec with mode=generated, formats=csv,xlsx,pdf.
rows.test_instruction: Verify student_validation_report appears in file/document registry.

rows.question: What formats are allowed for 'Student Validation Report'?
rows.build_instruction: Validate allowed file formats for student_validation_report: csv,xlsx,pdf.
rows.test_instruction: Reject unsupported file format for student_validation_report.

rows.question: What is document/file 'Parent Consent Declaration' used for?
rows.answer: School declaration confirming parent consent has been obtained for submitted students.
rows.build_instruction: Represent document parent_consent_declaration in files/documents spec with mode=uploaded_or_generated, formats=pdf,jpg,png.
rows.test_instruction: Verify parent_consent_declaration appears in file/document registry.

rows.build_instruction: Validate allowed file formats for parent_consent_declaration: pdf,jpg,png.
rows.test_instruction: Reject unsupported file format for parent_consent_declaration.

rows.question: What is document/file 'Certificate PDF' used for?
rows.build_instruction: Represent document certificate_pdf in files/documents spec with mode=generated, formats=pdf.
rows.test_instruction: Verify certificate_pdf appears in file/document registry.

rows.question: Who uploads or generates 'Certificate PDF'?
rows.build_instruction: Implement upload/generation permission for certificate_pdf.
rows.test_instruction: Permission test verifies only system,results_approver can create certificate_pdf.

rows.question: What formats are allowed for 'Certificate PDF'?
rows.build_instruction: Validate allowed file formats for certificate_pdf: pdf.
rows.test_instruction: Reject unsupported file format for certificate_pdf.

rows.question: What visibility/security applies to 'Certificate PDF'?
rows.build_instruction: Apply file access policy for certificate_pdf: private; Private file; public route only verifies limited metadata.
rows.test_instruction: File access test verifies certificate_pdf cannot be accessed by unauthorised users.

rows.question: What lifecycle/control rule applies to 'Certificate PDF'?
rows.answer: Private file; public route only verifies limited metadata.
rows.build_instruction: Implement lifecycle/control rule for certificate_pdf: Private file; public route only verifies limited metadata.
rows.test_instruction: Lifecycle test verifies gates/audit for certificate_pdf.

rows.question: What is document/file 'Certificate Bulk ZIP' used for?
rows.answer: ZIP of all issued certificates for one school/participation.
rows.build_instruction: Represent document certificate_bulk_zip in files/documents spec with mode=generated, formats=zip.
rows.test_instruction: Verify certificate_bulk_zip appears in file/document registry.

rows.question: Who uploads or generates 'Certificate Bulk ZIP'?
rows.build_instruction: Implement upload/generation permission for certificate_bulk_zip.
rows.test_instruction: Permission test verifies only system can create certificate_bulk_zip.

rows.question: What formats are allowed for 'Certificate Bulk ZIP'?
rows.build_instruction: Validate allowed file formats for certificate_bulk_zip: zip.
rows.test_instruction: Reject unsupported file format for certificate_bulk_zip.

rows.question: What visibility/security applies to 'Certificate Bulk ZIP'?
rows.build_instruction: Apply file access policy for certificate_bulk_zip: private; Generated on demand; own-school only; download audited.
rows.test_instruction: File access test verifies certificate_bulk_zip cannot be accessed by unauthorised users.

rows.question: What lifecycle/control rule applies to 'Certificate Bulk ZIP'?
rows.answer: Generated on demand; own-school only; download audited.
rows.build_instruction: Implement lifecycle/control rule for certificate_bulk_zip: Generated on demand; own-school only; download audited.
rows.test_instruction: Lifecycle test verifies gates/audit for certificate_bulk_zip.

rows.question: What is document/file 'Certificate Template' used for?
rows.build_instruction: Represent document certificate_template in files/documents spec with mode=uploaded_or_generated, formats=html,pdf,docx.
rows.test_instruction: Verify certificate_template appears in file/document registry.

rows.question: Who uploads or generates 'Certificate Template'?
rows.build_instruction: Implement upload/generation permission for certificate_template.
rows.test_instruction: Permission test verifies only results_approver,finverse_admin can create certificate_template.

rows.question: What formats are allowed for 'Certificate Template'?
rows.build_instruction: Validate allowed file formats for certificate_template: html,pdf,docx.
rows.test_instruction: Reject unsupported file format for certificate_template.

rows.question: What visibility/security applies to 'Certificate Template'?
rows.build_instruction: Apply file access policy for certificate_template: restricted; Versioned; changes require approval before generation.
rows.test_instruction: File access test verifies certificate_template cannot be accessed by unauthorised users.

rows.question: What lifecycle/control rule applies to 'Certificate Template'?
rows.answer: Versioned; changes require approval before generation.
rows.build_instruction: Implement lifecycle/control rule for certificate_template: Versioned; changes require approval before generation.
rows.test_instruction: Lifecycle test verifies gates/audit for certificate_template.
